# mgc_container_registry_user (Data Source)

Returns the authenticated Container Registry user, useful for retrieving the user ID to use in other resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mgc_container_registry_user" "user" {}

output "user" {
  value = data.mgc_container_registry_user.user
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the user was created
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the container registry user
- `username` (String) Username assigned to the container registry user
